---
title: Сдача отчетов
---
# Добро пожаловать

html
<form action="https://formsubmit.co/akhmedova.kr@gmail.com" method="POST" enctype="multipart/form-data">
  <input type="text" name="name" placeholder="ФИО" required>
  <input type="text" name="group" placeholder="Группа" required>
  <input type="file" name="attachment" required>
  <input type="hidden" name="_subject" value="Новый отчет!">
  <button type="submit">Отправить</button>
</form>
